title: nicotiana nyctaginiflora
intro: Nicotiana nyctaginiflora, also known as the flowering tobacco or jasmine tobacco, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, characterized by its delicate white or pink flowers and sweet fragrance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Nicotiana nyctaginiflora include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and calmness.
